name: KAIRAI ENGEKI: SENKEN NO MAI (PUPPET THEATER: DANCE OF A THOUSAND BLADES)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu

Rank: 4 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 17 | Successes: 2

Perform: 5 | Perform DC: 17

Components: E, H

You must control 2 puppets with the Wire components, and all squares adjacent to the target must be unoccupied in order for you to use this technique. Each puppet will draw the other's Wire, running it between them and move around the target in a flurry of razor-sharp attacks. Both puppets will make an attack using the Wire as a weapon, including a bonus for flanking. Each attack deals 3d6 slashing damage and has a critical of 20, x2. The target must save or be dazed for 1 round, even if both attacks miss.

The puppets will end up in two squares adjacent to the target, so that they are flanking them.
